description: Provide a comprehensive, user-friendly guide of all available Kyberion intents and automation workflows.

params.instruction: Based on the provided standard-intents list, generate a beautifully formatted, user-friendly Markdown guide titled 'Kyberion Capability Catalog'. Group the intents into logical categories (e.g., 'Automation & Learning', 'Content Creation', 'Operations', 'System Health'). For each intent, show its primary surface example (how to ask) and what the outcome will be. Highlight the new 'Learn and Automate' capabilities as a premium feature set.
